posts.title: The ERCOT Battery Queue Is Not a Pipeline
posts.description: 163 GW of battery storage sits in ERCOT's interconnection queue. Understanding what separates queue depth from actual build-out is critical for any serious siting or investment decision.
posts.excerpt: The 160+ GW figure appears frequently in market commentary as evidence of momentum. It is not. It is a count of expressed interest at a specific point in time.
posts.imageAlt: ERCOT battery queue analysis - interconnection reality

posts.title: Can Indian Solar Power it's Industrial Future?
posts.description: India's solar buildout is real and accelerating - but can it power a China-scale industrial boom? A data-driven comparison of electricity demand, generation mix, and what the IEA numbers actually say.
posts.excerpt: Solar is doing real work in India. But 'doing real work' and 'enabling a China-scale industrial boom' are different claims. The numbers show why.
posts.imageAlt: Solar panels in India - industrial energy transition

posts.title: How a Battery Makes Money: Ancillary Services
posts.description: How battery energy storage systems earn revenue through ancillary services in ERCOT - regulation, RRS, ECRS, what ERCOT paid in Q1 2025, and how the combined energy + AS stack closes the series.
posts.excerpt: Energy arbitrage captures the price spread between hours. Ancillary services pay the battery just to be ready. Q1 2025 ERCOT data shows what both streams actually produced.
posts.imageAlt: Battery energy storage system in a landscape setting

posts.title: How a Battery Makes Money: Energy Arbitrage
posts.shortTitle: How a Battery Makes Money: Energy Arbitrage
posts.description: How battery energy storage systems earn revenue through energy arbitrage in ERCOT - the mechanics of spread capture, the optimiser that makes it work, and what Q1 2025 data shows about achievable returns.
posts.excerpt: The spread between overnight lows and evening peaks is the entire energy arbitrage opportunity. Here is what it takes to actually capture it - physics, optimisation, and Q1 2025 ERCOT results.
posts.imageAlt: Battery energy arbitrage - price spread capture in ERCOT

posts.title: What a Battery Actually Does on the Grid
posts.shortTitle: What a Battery Does on the Grid
posts.description: A clear explanation of what a battery energy storage system actually does on the grid - energy shifting, ancillary services, and the dispatch tension that defines BESS economics.
posts.excerpt: Two functions drive battery revenue: shifting energy in time, and providing the reliability services grid operators have always needed. Understanding both - and the constraint they share - is the foundation for BESS economics.
posts.imageAlt: What a battery energy storage system does on the grid

posts.title: Why the Grid Needs Batteries
posts.description: Why renewable energy is creating an urgent need for battery storage on modern grids. Explore how batteries solve the frequency stability and energy timing challenges that renewables create.
posts.excerpt: The mismatch between when clean energy is available and when people need it is the central engineering challenge of the modern grid - and it is why batteries have become critical infrastructure.
posts.imageAlt: Why the grid needs batteries for renewable integration

posts.title: Stop Waiting on Pandas: Parquet and DuckDB for Energy Data Analytics
posts.description: One file format change, two tools, and a benchmark that will change how you work locally. How Parquet and DuckDB cut query time 4.6x on real ERCOT SCED data - and open up a new class of questions for energy analysts.
posts.excerpt: 34.9x smaller than CSV, 4.6x faster to query. Here's what Parquet and DuckDB do and why they matter for energy data work.
posts.imageAlt: Parquet and DuckDB for energy data analytics

posts.title: Battery Dispatch as an Options Strategy - A German Market Case Study
posts.shortTitle: Battery Dispatch as an Options Strategy
posts.description: Germany hit 573 negative-price hours in 2025. The operators profiting aren't forecasting prices - they're harvesting volatility like options traders. Here's how.
posts.excerpt: Germany hit 573 negative-price hours in 2025. The operators profiting aren't forecasting prices - they're harvesting volatility like options traders.

posts.title: Design Principles for Energy Data Products
posts.description: If a chart does not tell me what it is about in 10 seconds, it has failed. A set of design principles for energy data products - on restraint, clarity, and letting data be the hero.
posts.excerpt: Less is not laziness. It is the hardest thing to get right, and most people never bother trying.
posts.imageAlt: The retro terminal era of this website - VAGABOND.EXE

posts.title: Modelling Battery Dispatch in Energy Markets using Python
posts.description: A practical walkthrough of two-stage linear programming for battery storage dispatch optimization across ERCOT's Day-Ahead and Real-Time markets - with perfect-foresight results across Q1 2025.
posts.excerpt: Real-time flexibility added 32–55% on top of day-ahead revenue. A linear program finds the globally optimal schedule - no heuristic gets close.
posts.imageAlt: Battery dispatch optimization across ERCOT DA and RT markets

posts.title: How the Iran Conflict Affects the Global Energy Markets
posts.description: The Iran conflict erased the 2026 LNG surplus in seven days, exposing the structural fragility of Gulf energy dependence - and why the energy security case for distributed generation has never been stronger.
posts.excerpt: In seven days, a single geopolitical event restructured global energy markets in ways that will take years to fully price in.
posts.imageAlt: LNG tanker on open water - global energy supply routes

posts.title: TB4 Spread Futures: ERCOT vs CAISO - Hedging the Battery Revolution
posts.description: An analysis of TB4 spread futures across ERCOT and CAISO trading hubs - exploring pricing premiums, forecasting accuracy, and hedging implications for battery storage operators navigating an increasingly arbitrage-driven market.
posts.excerpt: ERCOT's TB4 hubs averaged 48.5% premium over CAISO, but with proportionally higher volatility. Early lessons from TB4 futures for BESS operators.
posts.imageAlt: TB4 Monthly Settlement Paths - ERCOT vs CAISO

posts.title: ERCOT Battery Monitor 2024: Market Analysis and Revenue Trends
posts.description: The ERCOT energy storage market has experienced significant transformation in 2024, with revenue dropping from $18/kW-month to $7/kW-month. This analysis examines the key trends and their implications for battery storage operators.
posts.excerpt: Analysis of ERCOT energy storage market transformation and revenue patterns in 2024
posts.imageAlt: ERCOT Battery Market Analysis - Top Assets by Month

posts.title: The Great AI Disruption: Purpose Over Programmers
posts.description: Exploring the impact of AI on tech careers and the importance of purpose-driven work in an age of automation.
posts.excerpt: Exploring the impact of AI on tech careers and the importance of purpose-driven work
